audit_items.proof_trace: EIP-7892 epoch-dependent blob parameters are correctly implemented via Config::max_blobs_per_block(epoch) which calls get_blob_schedule_entry(epoch) for Fulu phase. Fulu block processing (fulu/block_processing.rs:187) uses this epoch-dependent lookup, and blob_schedule allows per-epoch variation (verified in Sepolia/Holesky configs).
